ai.title: Help Assistant
ai.desc: Having issues with the app? Ask a question below.
ai.greet: Hello! I am your assistant. How can I help you today?
ai.resp.default: I'm sorry, I don't understand the question. Try asking about 'camera', 'training', or 'statistics'.
ai.resp.camera:
If the camera isn't working:
1. Check if another app is blocking it.
2. Ensure you've granted system permissions.
3. Restart the app.
ai.resp.train: To start, go to the Home section (house icon) and select an available training program.
ai.resp.stats: Your results are automatically saved in the Records tab (trophy icon).
